findings.detail: Unused imports: mean and stdev from statistics module. Unused constant: _BASIS_2SIGMA_MULTIPLIER = 2.0 (2-sigma analysis not yet implemented; hard thresholds used instead). Dead code.
findings.mitigation: Remove unused imports/constants in next cleanup pass, or implement 2-sigma analysis.

findings.detail: Analysis is pure heuristic computation over already-fetched data (no direct network calls). All data flows through gateway/cross_border which validates at the boundary. Country matching uses .lower() normalization. Safe.

notes: No LLM calls, no file I/O, no direct network. All external data fetches delegated to gateway/cross_border. Graceful degradation via data_quality spectrum: UNAVAILABLE -> PARTIAL -> FULL. Country-to-CCB mapping is static dict.
